conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

You previously explained the attendance management system. If a student is absent without excuse for a cumulative total of ten classes, and the parents have not provided any legitimate reason to the homeroom teacher, what penalty can the school impose?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle ten unexcused absences with no explanation from parents</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:100005] Time: 2026-06-08-21:20, Content: Attendance and Leave Management System: If a student is absent without excuse for a cumulative total of ten classes, and the parent or guardian has not provided any legitimate reason to the homeroom teacher, the school may issue a serious warning and cancel the student's eligibility for annual awards, or require the student to sign in daily at the security office and attend one hour of after-school make-up study. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:100005] stipulates that the school may issue a serious warning and cancel annual award eligibility, or require daily sign-in at the security office and one hour of after-school make-up study.
conversations.content: According to the Attendance and Leave Management System, the school may issue a serious warning and cancel the student's eligibility for annual awards, or require the student to sign in daily at the security office and attend one hour of after-school make-up study!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
